careers.title: Careers for DeHub
careers.subtitle: Join di team wey dey build di future of decentralised social media
careers.intro: We dey look for passionate people wey want be part of di next wave of social media. All positions na fully remote with flexible hours.
careers.bdmAbout: As Business Development Manager for DeHub you go be di driving force behind our partnership strategy.
careers.bdmResp1: Find and secure strategic partnerships with Web2 and Web3 companies
careers.bdmResp2: Build and manage pipeline of potential partners
careers.bdmResp4: Negotiate partnership terms and revenue sharing models
careers.bdmResp5: Work with product and marketing teams
careers.bdmReq1: Proven experience for business development or sales for tech or Web3
careers.bdmReq2: Strong network for crypto/Web3 space na big plus
careers.bdmReq4: Self-motivated and comfortable for work on your own
careers.bdmReq5: Genuine interest for decentralized social media or blockchain
careers.bdmComp: Dis position dey offer negotiable base salary plus uncapped OTE commission structure.
careers.ambassadorAbout: As DeHub Brand Ambassador you be di face and voice of di platform for your community.
careers.ambassadorResp1: Create and share authentic content about DeHub
careers.ambassadorResp2: Actively engage with di DeHub community for di app
careers.ambassadorResp4: Bring new users to di platform through your network
careers.ambassadorReq2: Passion for Web3, crypto or creator culture
careers.ambassadorReq4: Self-driven, fit plan campaigns on your own
careers.ambassadorComp: Ambassadors go receive negotiable monthly salary.
careers.footerText: You no see role wey fit you? Reach us for
careers.pastExperiencePlaceholder: Tell us about your relevant experience...
careers.whyHireYouPlaceholder: Wetin make you di right person for dis role?
careers.applicationSuccess: Application don submit well well! We go reach out.
careers.applicationFailed: E no fit submit. Abeg try again.
